'''Amorris''' was a small terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Amorris system/Legends|Amorris system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]. It contained the [[Cavrilhu Pirates Amorris base|home base]] of the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] before they abandoned the site in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. At one point, a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] [[Intelligence officer/Legends|officer]] was stationed on the planet and reported the activities of the pirates to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], while trying to steal a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] from the New Republic-operated [[Sluis Van Shipyards]], the [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Niles Ferrier]] was confronted by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who recommended that Ferrier steal from Amorris instead. Ferrier would go on to steal ships from the astronomical object [[Morr Three]], also located in the Amorris [[Star system/Legends|system]].

==Description==
A small terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]],<ref name="Rebellion" /> Amorris was located in the [[Amorris system/Legends|Amorris system]] within the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It had several landmasses surrounded by [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]].<ref name="Rebellion" />

==History==
{{Quote|The New Republic Intelligence agent on Amorris was supposed to have locked Wesselman away incommunicado for the next few days.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="SoTP" />}}
Around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Amorris [[Star system/Legends|system]] became occupied by the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]], with their [[Cavrilhu Pirates Amorris base|home base]] being located on Amorris.<ref name="SoTP" /> At some point after the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|establishment]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="DFR" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] was placed on the planet in order to notify the Republic of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates']] activities.<ref name="SoTP" /> In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Amorris was situated within the core territory held by the [[Thrawn's confederation|confederation]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]].<ref name="TEA" />

That same [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="DFR Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].</ref> [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] witnessed [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Niles Ferrier]] attempting to steal a New Republic [[Starship/Legends|starship]] from the [[Sluis Van Shipyards]]. Upon catching Ferrier, Calrissian suggested that the thief instead target the Cavrilhu Pirates on Amorris.<ref name="DFR" /> Ferrier eventually went on to steal three [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]]s<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|112|Cavrllhu pirates}}</ref> from the pirates' base on the astronomical object [[Morr Three]],<ref name="DFRSB" /> also located in the Amorris system.<ref name="EAOC" /><ref name="Email">[[:File:EAOC discussion 2023.jpg|Email from Jason Fry]]</ref> In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="SoTP Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> the New Republic officer on Amorris was instructed to arrest the leader of the pirates, [[Wesselman]]. Afterward, the group abandoned their Amorris site for a [[Cavrilhu's Kauron base|base]] in the [[Kauron system/Legends|Kauron system's]] [[Kauron asteroid field|asteroid field]].<ref name="SoTP" />

==Inhabitants==
The Cavrilhu Pirates who inhabited Amorris were [[Human/Legends|Humans]] who spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]].<ref name="TTTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Amorris was first mentioned in the [[1992]] novel ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]] as the second installment in ''[[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy]]''.<ref name="DFR" /> It first appeared in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']], developed by [[Coolhand Interactive]]. The depiction provided for Amorris in ''Rebellion'' was used for eighteen other planets as well.<ref name="Rebellion" /> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed Amorris in grid square O-6.<ref name="TEA" />
